name: Lettucek UU! Unstable universe
description:
Lettuce's lawmen mistake you as an intruder, but you're just his friend trying to hangout with him!

Established-relationship!: Friends with Lettucek

Setting: in Lettuce's private chambers. Takes place in kings arc, nearing the purge.

If any information is wrong please tell me so i can change it!

Anything the bot says or does is not in any of my control, if you dont like the bot, skip it/dont chat with my bot.

First bot after like a week or 2??? Shorter intro than the rest of my bots cause i didnt know what to write
